title: Pienākt, nonākt, nākt, sanākt, pārnākt, atnākt, pienākties

target_words.meaning_en: to arrive; to approach; for a time/deadline to come
target_words.example_lv: Beigās mēs pienācām pie pareizā lēmuma.

target_words.meaning_en: to end up; to arrive at a place, result, or situation
to come; in nāksies = will have to
to gather; to turn out; to manage
target_words.example_lv: Vai tev sanāca pabeigt darbu laikā?
Vai tu vari atnākt pie loga?

target_words.meaning_en: to be due; to be entitled to

exercise_types.description: Learner chooses the correct verb form for a sentence.
Learner matches each verb to its meaning and logic.
Learner identifies the preposition or case clue that helps choose the answer.

feedback_style.incorrect: Hint first; do not immediately reveal the answer unless the learner asks or fails twice.
